-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1


Hi again,

this is the final version for now.
- From 6.x to CURRENT everything should work now.
Had to add some more missing headers for 6.x and some glue to get -pthread 
into LDFLAGS.
I've tinderbox tested this patch on 6-, 7- and 8-STABLE from today.
On CURRENT it's only compile tested w/o tinderbox.

Kind regards
Joerg

- -- 
The beginning is the most important part of the work.
 				-Plato
